text:
Created attachment 240484
0001-games-lwjgl-Update-3.3.1.patch

Hello

I managed to build lwjgl version 3.3.1 When I see only version 2.9.4 in the ports https://www.freshports.org/games/lwjgl/.

Is there a reason lwjgl hasn't been updated on FreeBSD yet???
